title: Wordless Wednesday: Peach Rose
excerpt: I bought a dozen peach roses when I went to the Philly Flower Show a few weeks ago. They’ve all wilted and bit the dust one by one, but this solitary rose in it’s own little vase by my mom’s photo is holding strong! Isn’t it lovely!?
content:
I bought a dozen peach roses when I went to the Philly Flower Show a few weeks ago. They’ve all wilted and bit the dust one by one, but this solitary rose in it’s own little vase by my mom’s photo is holding strong! Isn’t it lovely!?

I had planned on doing a full Flower Show recap post in the days after the show, but I got a terrible stomach bug and couldn’t bring myself to edit hundreds of photos! Since I’m finally better, I’ll be sharing all those lovely pics later this week! Stay tuned!
